commentary_links.hebrew: וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ אֶל־הָעָ֔ם הֱי֥וּ נְכֹנִ֖ים לִשְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת יָמִ֑ים אַֽל־תִּגְּשׁ֖וּ אֶל־אִשָּֽׁה׃
commentary_links.english: And he said to the men,dthe men Heb. “the people.” Moses’ intended audience is not further specified because it goes without saying: by convention in Israelite society, only men are treated as the active agent in heterosexual relations. “Be ready for the third day: do not go near a woman.”

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאִם־נְקֵבָ֣ה תֵלֵ֔ד וְטָמְאָ֥ה שְׁבֻעַ֖יִם כְּנִדָּתָ֑הּ וְשִׁשִּׁ֥ים יוֹם֙ וְשֵׁ֣שֶׁת יָמִ֔ים תֵּשֵׁ֖ב עַל־דְּמֵ֥י טׇהֳרָֽהֿ׃
commentary_links.english: If she bears a female, she shall be impure two weeks as during her menstruation, and she shall remain in a state of blood purificationcstate of blood purification See note at v. 4. for sixty-six days.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: זיבה &star לא צריכא שירדה לטבול מטומאה לטהרה &star וכי הא דאמר רבי זירא אמר

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאִשָּׁ֕ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר יִשְׁכַּ֥ב אִ֛ישׁ אֹתָ֖הּ שִׁכְבַת־זָ֑רַע וְרָחֲצ֣וּ בַמַּ֔יִם וְטָמְא֖וּ עַד־הָעָֽרֶב׃ {פ}
commentary_links.english: And involving a woman: when a man has carnal relations with her, both shall bathe in water and remain impure until evening.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: קאמר כי כתב רחמנא ורחצו במים וטמאו
